true_header: PCH Median Improvements Project ¾ Updates:  The project was approved by the Planning Commission on September 8, 2021. This project requires Caltrans approval since the work will be on  Pacific  Coast  Highway.  The  project  reports  and  plans  are  being routed through Caltrans for final approval.  The project will have final approval by the end of the March.  The project will be advertised for
